jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at CMC Vellore
jsonLd.description:
CMC Vellore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CMC Vellore:
CMC Vellore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore!
